mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oa_attendance (employee_id, department_id, work_date, session_name, check_in, check_out, check_in_ip, check_out_ip, check_in_start_time, normal_check_in_end_time, check_in_end_time, normal_check_out_start_time, check_out_end_time, status, replenish_status, replenish_reason, approver_id, approve_time, approve_comment, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{departmentId}, #{workDate}, #{sessionName}, #{checkIn}, #{checkOut}, #{checkInIp}, #{checkOutIp}, #{checkInStartTime}, #{normalCheckInEndTime}, #{checkInEndTime}, #{normalCheckOutStartTime}, #{checkOutEndTime}, #{status}, #{replenishStatus}, #{replenishReason}, #{approverId}, #{approveTime}, #{approveComment}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, e.name as employee_name, d.name as department_name, app_e.name as approver_name FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.approver_id = u.id LEFT JOIN oa_employee app_e ON u.employee_id = app_e.id WHERE a.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND a.work_date = #{workDate} ORDER BY a.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.*, e.name as employee_name, d.name as department_name, app_e.name as approver_name FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.approver_id = u.id LEFT JOIN oa_employee app_e ON u.employee_id = app_e.id WHERE a.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND a.work_date = #{workDate} AND a.session_name = #{sessionName} LIMIT 1

SELECT a.*, e.name as employee_name, d.name as department_name, app_e.name as approver_name FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.approver_id = u.id LEFT JOIN oa_employee app_e ON u.employee_id = app_e.id WHERE a.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND a.work_date = #{workDate} ORDER BY a.id ASC

SELECT a.*, e.name as employee_name, d.name as department_name, app_e.name as approver_name FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.approver_id = u.id LEFT JOIN oa_employee app_e ON u.employee_id = app_e.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, emp.name as employee_name, d.name as department_name, app_e.name as approver_name FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee emp ON a.employee_id = emp.id LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON emp.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.approver_id = u.id LEFT JOIN oa_employee app_e ON u.employee_id = app_e.id
ORDER BY a.work_date DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee emp ON a.employee_id = emp.id

SELECT a.status as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee emp ON a.employee_id = emp.id
GROUP BY a.status
SELECT id FROM oa_employee WHERE status = 1

SELECT id FROM oa_employee WHERE status = 1
AND department_id = #{departmentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE oa_attendance SET check_in_start_time = #{checkInStartTime}, normal_check_in_end_time = #{normalCheckInEndTime}, check_in_end_time = #{checkInEndTime}, normal_check_out_start_time = #{normalCheckOutStartTime}, check_out_end_time = #{checkOutEndTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND work_date = #{workDate} AND session_name = #{sessionName} AND check_out IS NULL
